metadata.title: cvdev — Your first tech job
metadata.description: Upload your CV, paste the job offer and receive a personalized AI analysis. Designed for junior devs.

landing.subheadline: Compatibility with the offer, actionable improvements and cover letter. In less than a minute.
landing.social_proof: Free analysis · No sign-up · No credit card
landing.trust_strip: No sign-up  ·  No credit card  ·  Results in 30 seconds
landing.feature_1_desc: How well your profile matches the offer. Explanation of strengths and what's missing.
landing.feature_2_desc: Suggestions on projects, GitHub, technical keywords and format. Ordered by impact.
landing.feature_2_example: "Add unit testing to the main repo."
landing.feature_3_desc: Ready to copy and send. Tailored to your profile and the specific offer.
landing.why_1: Detects keywords that ATS filters automatically
landing.why_2: Evaluates whether your GitHub projects are relevant to the offer
landing.why_3: Generates letters that sound human, not like a template
landing.example_quote: "Your tech stack covers 60% of the requirements. Adding 2-3 React and TypeScript projects on GitHub would raise your compatibility to 85+."
landing.preview_tip: "Add a REST project with Node.js to compensate for the lack of work experience."
landing.footer_tagline_2: devs looking for their first job.

analyze.title: Upload your CV and the offer.
analyze.subtitle: The analysis takes less than 30 seconds.
analyze.job_placeholder: Paste the full text of the offer here...
analyze.loading_disclaimer: Don't close this page. It may take up to 30 seconds.
analyze.idle_disclaimer: No sign-up · Your data is not permanently stored
analyze.error_cv: Please upload your CV as PDF.
analyze.error_job: The offer seems too short. Paste the full text.
analyze.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.s1_body: Your CV in PDF and the job offer text you enter. This data is sent to OpenAI to generate the analysis and is not stored on our servers once the process is completed.
privacy.s2_body: Exclusively to generate the compatibility analysis, improvements and cover letter. We do not use your data to train models or for any other purpose.
privacy.s3_body_1: The analysis is processed through the OpenAI API. You can check their privacy policy at
privacy.s3_body_2: . OpenAI does not use data sent via API to train its models.
privacy.s4_body: We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics tools. There is no tracking of any kind.
privacy.s5_body_1: For any privacy questions you can write to us at

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.s1_body: cvdev is a free AI CV analysis tool. You can use it to improve your candidacy for real job offers.
terms.s2_body: Do not use the service for illegal purposes, do not attempt to overload or attack the API, do not resell the service or the generated results.
terms.s3_body: The analysis is generated by AI and is for guidance purposes only. cvdev does not guarantee results in selection processes. Hiring decisions depend exclusively on each company.
terms.s4_body: We may update these terms at any time. Changes will be published on this page with the update date.
terms.s5_body_1: For any questions you can write to us at
